Landing.trialBadge: 14-day free trial — no credit card required
Landing.heroTitle: Stop your seniors from being trainers
Landing.heroSubtitle: Turn your team's expertise into AI-generated procedures. New hires follow step-by-step checklists and get instant help — without interrupting anyone.
Landing.painPoint1: Seniors spending hours training new hires instead of doing their job
Landing.painPoint2: Tribal knowledge lost when key people leave
Landing.painPoint3: Inconsistent onboarding leading to costly mistakes
Landing.painPoint4: No documented procedures, everything lives in someone's head
Landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to free your seniors from repetitive training.
Landing.feature1Desc: Describe your process in plain language. Our AI creates a detailed, step-by-step Standard Operating Procedure in seconds.
Landing.feature2Desc: Operators follow interactive checklists. Every step is tracked, so managers know exactly where things stand.
Landing.feature3Desc: Stuck on a step? Operators get instant AI guidance or can escalate to a manager. No more interrupting seniors.
Landing.ctaTitle: Ready to stop wasting senior time?
Landing.ctaSubtitle: Start your 14-day free trial. Full access, no credit card required.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Transform your team's expertise into clear, AI-generated procedures. New hires become productive from day one.
Pricing.planDescription: Everything you need to onboard your team efficiently.
Pricing.trialInfo: 14-day free trial. Full access. No credit card required.

Auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your SOP Assistant account
Auth.checkEmailDescription: We've sent you a confirmation link. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
Auth.checkEmailSpam: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or resend the confirmation email.

Onboarding.createOrgSubtitle: Set up your team workspace to get started.

Invite.title: You're invited!
Invite.invitedTo: You've been invited to join {orgName} as {role}.
Invite.invalidInvite: This invite is invalid or has expired.
Invite.emailMismatchDesc: This invite was sent to {email}. Please log in with that email.

Admin.noMembers: No members yet. Invite your team to get started.

TrialExpired.title: Your trial has ended
TrialExpired.description: Your 14-day free trial of SOP Assistant has expired. Upgrade to keep your team running smoothly.
TrialExpired.dataIsSafeDesc: All your SOPs, checklists, and execution history are preserved. Upgrade anytime to pick up right where you left off.
TrialExpired.whatYouBuilt: What you built during your trial

Manager.noProcessesHint: Create your first process to generate an SOP.
Manager.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the process in detail. Include the goal, who is involved, key steps, and any important considerations...
Manager.descriptionHint: The more detail you provide, the better the generated SOP will be.
Manager.generatingSOP: Generating your SOP... This may take a few seconds.
Manager.noExecutions: No executions yet. Operators can start executing this process from their dashboard.

Assignments.noOrgOperators: No operators in your organization yet. Invite operators from the Members page.

Operator.noProcessesHint: Processes will appear here once a manager assigns them to you.

Checklist.title: Checklist
Checklist.stepsRemaining: Complete all steps to finish ({remaining} remaining)

Help.whatHelp: What do you need help with?
Help.questionPlaceholder: Describe what you're stuck on or need clarification about...
Help.notePlaceholder: Add any additional context for the manager...
Help.escalatedMessage: Your question has been escalated to the manager. They will review it and get back to you.

Errors.descriptionTooShort: Please provide a more detailed description (at least 20 characters).
Errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
Errors.operatorNotFound: No operator found with that email in your organization.
Errors.notAnOperator: That user is not an operator.
Errors.alreadyAssigned: This operator is already assigned to this process.
Errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
Errors.already_in_org: You are already a member of an organization.
Errors.already_member: This person is already a member of your organization.
Errors.already_invited: An invite has already been sent to this email.
Errors.cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove yourself from the organization.
Errors.invite_not_found_or_expired: Invite not found or has expired.
Errors.email_mismatch: This invite was sent to a different email address.
Errors.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
Errors.email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email address before logging in.
Errors.user_already_registered: An account with this email already exists.
Errors.email_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Errors.weak_password: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
Errors.password_too_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
Errors.invalid_email_format: Please enter a valid email address.

Chat.title: AI Assistant
Chat.subtitle: Ask about: {processTitle}

Chat.escalated: Your conversation has been escalated to the manager.
